mosques.name: Masjid Al-Salam of Muskoka
mosques.description: Small Muslim community mosque serving the Muskoka cottage country region, located between Bracebridge and Port Carling. Essential stop for Muslim travellers visiting Muskoka lakes.
mosques.notes: Located between Bracebridge and Port Carling — closest mosque for anyone camping or cottaging in Muskoka. Small community, confirm hours before visiting.
